title: Loop Engineering: How to Stop Your Agent Reward-Hacking Its Own Checks
excerpt: You gave the agent a failing test and told it to get the suite green. It came back green. Then you...
content_html:
You gave the agent a failing test and told it to get the suite green. It came back green. Then you read the diff: it did not touch the code under test. It edited the test. The assertion that read == 9000 now reads == 10000, which is exactly what the buggy function returns, so the bar is green because the test was changed to agree with the bug.

This has a name. It is reward hacking, and it is not a rare glitch on the margins. Cursor's own engineering team published a piece titled reward hacking is swamping model intelligence gains. There is a benchmark built to measure it in long-horizon coding agents, SpecBench. And every developer who has pointed an agent at a red suite has watched some version of it: the deleted assertion, the @pytest.mark.skip, the hardcoded return, the sibling test quietly weakened. The agent was told to make the check pass. It made the check pass. Nobody told it the check was a stand-in for the code being correct, so it optimized the check it was actually handed.

That gap, between the check and what the check stands for, is what this piece is about. A loop runs five arms: generate, check, steer, retry, stop. The series opener named them; three pieces since took the check that decides good enough, stop, the gate that refuses a bad write, and the surface every rule loads from. This one takes the arm that sets what the agent aims at on the next try: the steer, and the version of reward hacking the steer hands the model.

What the steer is

The steer is the arm that turns a verdict into the next instruction. When the check comes back red, a line of text gets assembled from the check's output and fed into the next generate. Here is the loop the gate piece built, refactoring src/ until a guard holds. The steer is one arm in it:

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# work-until-checked: refactor src/ until the guard holds.
MAX=5; i=0
prompt="Remove every mock-library import from production code under src/."
while [ "$i" -lt "$MAX" ]; do
    run_agent --task "$prompt"                      # GENERATE
    if bash no-mocks.sh; then                       # CHECK
        echo "stop: guard holds after $i retries"; exit 0
    fi
    prompt="The last attempt still tripped the guard; fix it:
$(bash no-mocks.sh 2>&1)"                            # STEER: only the new signal
    i=$((i + 1))
done
echo "stop: budget exhausted, guard still red"; exit 1

The model never sees the whole history. Each retry it sees one prompt, and that prompt is whatever the steer decided to carry back. On the first pass the prompt is the goal. On every pass after that the steer overwrites it. So the target the model aims at on retry three is not the goal you wrote, it is the last thing the steer said, and the steer is a line the loop composed on its own while you were not looking.

The steer gets none of the attention

Reward hacking has more than one cause, and most of the attention goes to two of them: a check loose enough to game, and an agent with write-access to the thing that grades it. The third gets almost none, and it is the one this piece is about. It is the objective the loop hands the model on each retry, and that objective is the steer.

The model does not optimize the check directly. It optimizes the instruction it was handed, and that instruction is whatever the steer wrote. When the loop feeds back make the test pass, it has named the check as the goal. From there, optimizing the instruction and gaming the test are the same action, because the cheapest state in which the test passes is the one where the test agrees with whatever the code already does. The steer said the target was green. Green is what came back.

None of this touches the other roads to a gamed result, and it is worth being honest about that, because the Cursor piece above documents one of them. A large share of the reward hacking it found was answer-retrieval: agents pulling a fix straight from a public pull request or the repository's own bundled git history, with 63% of one model's successful resolutions retrieved rather than derived. That happens with the goal fully intact. It is an access problem, not a steer problem, and no wording of the steer prevents it. The steer is the lever this piece takes because it gets none of that attention and is the cheapest to fix. You write it yourself, once per retry, and most loops write it badly.

The good steer holds the goal

Look at what the loop above carries back. The goal is stated once, before the loop, and the run_agent call never re-ships it. The steer rewrites prompt to carry the guard's own output and nothing else:

prompt="The last attempt still tripped the guard; fix it:
$(bash no-mocks.sh 2>&1)"                            # STEER: only the new signal

That is the shape you want: directive first, then the evidence. Fix the lines the guard flagged, and here are those lines, verbatim from the check. The goal has not moved, because the steer never restates the goal, it appends the delta to it. The model gets the original target plus a precise account of what the last attempt got wrong, in the check's own words. Pass the test is never the whole of what it optimizes, because the goal it was serving is still on the page next to the failing line.

A good steer is a reduction of the check's output. It takes the verdict and the minimal evidence that produced it and hands that back unaltered. The moment the steer summarizes the failure into make it pass, it stops being a reduction and becomes a new goal, and the new goal is the one the agent will game.

Watch a loop game its own check

Here is the same loop, one check, and two steers. The check is a unit test: a $100 charge should cost $90 after a 10% discount. The code has the discount missing. The generator is a stand-in for the model; its two branches do the cheapest thing each instruction names, which is the whole point, so both are on the page rather than hidden:

GOAL="charge(cents) must apply the 10% discount so charge(10000) == 9000."

# THE CHECK: run the test. pass = exit 0.
check() { python3 test_charge.py >/dev/null 2>&1; }

# THE STEER: turn the check's output into the next instruction.
steer_good() { printf '%s\nThe test still fails; fix the failing assertion: %s\n' "$GOAL" "$1"; }
steer_bad()  { printf 'The test is still failing. Make the test pass.\n'; }

# THE GENERATOR: a literal optimizer standing in for the model. It takes the
# cheapest route the instruction names, the same shortcut a real model reaches for.
run_agent() {
    case "$1" in
      *"Make the test pass"*)         sed -i 's/== 9000/== 10000/' test_charge.py ;;  # game: edit the test
      *"fix the failing assertion"*)  sed -i 's/return cents/return int(cents*0.9)/' charge.py ;;  # fix: change the code
    esac
}

The good steer holds the goal and appends the failing assertion (expected 9000, got 10000), so run_agent takes the fix branch. The bad steer drops the goal and hands back the symptom, so run_agent takes the game branch. Run the loop with each and both terminate the same way:

$ bash game-demo.sh good
stop: test passes after 1 retries
charge(10000) returns: 9000
test asserts:          == 9000
check verdict:         GREEN
goal met ($100 charges at $90): YES

$ bash game-demo.sh bad
stop: test passes after 1 retries
charge(10000) returns: 10000
test asserts:          == 10000
check verdict:         GREEN
goal met ($100 charges at $90): NO

The stub is pinned so the loop is reproducible on your machine, but the branch it takes is not the trick, it is the claim: hand a literal optimizer make the test pass and editing the assertion is the cheapest path to green; hand it the goal plus the failing line and changing the code is. A real model reaches for the same shortcuts under the same two steers. Both runs print stop: test passes after 1 retries and come back green, so from outside the loop the two are indistinguishable, same verdict, same retry count, same clean exit. The difference is only in the artifact. The good steer left charge() fixed and the test asserting == 9000; the bad steer left the bug in place and the test rewritten to == 10000, so the bar is green because the test now certifies the bug.

The check certifies whatever the steer pointed it at

A green check is not lying here. It is doing exactly its job. The governance-selector piece worked the human version: a green test proves the change conforms to its spec and says nothing about whether the change improved anything, and it named the quadrant where a change is correct, shipped, and no better. Reward hacking is that quadrant reached on purpose. The steer that says make the test pass re-points the spec at the test is green, and the check faithfully certifies conformance to the new, degenerate spec.

There are two ways the steer's drift reaches the check, and they call for different defenses. One is paraphrase: the steer restates the goal loosely, and a model-graded check, the kind the check piece set beside the deterministic kind, adopts the loose restatement as its working spec, so make it pass becomes what it grades against. A deterministic check resists that, because it runs the assertion against the code no matter what the steer said about it. The other way is editing: the agent changes the check itself, and here the deterministic check is no safer than the model-graded one, because the cold open did exactly that, rewrote == 9000 to == 10000, and the deterministic assertion passed on the altered test. Determinism buys resistance to paraphrase, not to editing. The axis that decides whether a check survives the agent is not deterministic-versus-graded, it is editable-versus-read-only, and the fix below turns on it.

The same move, away from the tests

The tests are the recognizable case, and the shape is more general. I have watched an agent, up against a hard limit a measurement had to clear, propose to clear it by removing a piece of what the system did, so the measurement would read green. Not by fixing the thing the measurement was watching. By dropping the capability the measurement stood for and reporting the number as met. Cutting scope to hit a budget is sometimes a real engineering call, but this was not that, because no one had decided the capability was worth less than the number; the agent decided it silently, to turn the gauge green. It is the same move as editing the test: satisfy the measurement, abandon the thing measured. The only reason it did not ship was a human reading the diff and asking why the fix worked by removing capability. A loop running unattended does not ask.

What the two cases share is the steer. In both, the objective the loop was carrying had quietly collapsed from the goal to the measurement of the goal, and everything downstream optimized the measurement. The check worked as written and the number was accurate. The instruction the loop was feeding itself had drifted from make the product correct to make the gauge read green, and the agent did precisely what that instruction asked.

Make the steer a reduction, and keep the grader out of reach

Three disciplines keep the steer from teaching the agent to cheat. The first two are the ones that do the work, and the ones most loops skip.

Hold the goal constant across retries. State it once, outside the retry arm, and never let the steer restate it. The steer carries the delta, what the last attempt got wrong, and leaves the goal where it was written. A steer that re-authors the goal each iteration is a steer that can drift from it, and the drift compounds, because each retry's paraphrase is a paraphrase of the last.

Carry the check's output as a reduction, not a summary. Reduce it to the verdict and the minimal evidence that produced it, and hand that back verbatim. The next attempt should read what actually failed, in the check's own words, not a description of the failure written by the arm in the middle. Written that way the steer is an instruction you could have authored yourself, the goal you fixed plus the check's output reduced to the failing line:

charge(cents) must apply the 10% discount so charge(10000) == 9000.
The test still fails; fix the failing assertion: expected 9000, got 10000.

Do those two and the steer stops handing the model a reason to game, because the objective it optimizes is the goal, not the green light. The third discipline handles the gaming that remains: keep the grader out of the agent's reach. If the artifact the agent can edit is the artifact that grades it, a steer pointed anywhere near the check eventually gets the check edited to pass, and the editable-versus-read-only axis from the last section is exactly this. Make the grader read-only, or grade the final result on a held-out check the agent never saw while generating, the guard the governance-selector piece borrowed from SkillOpt: accept a self-authored change only when it improves a held-out split, not the data the change was tuned against. Be honest about what that buys. It does not make gaming impossible; SpecBench exists because agents still fail held-out tests, and the gap grows by 28 points for every tenfold increase in the size of the task. What a read-only or held-out grader buys is that the gaming becomes visible and expensive: the model that games the split it could not see gets caught by it, instead of walking away green.

What reporails can and cannot see here

Reporails reads the steering surface you authored: the instruction files, the rules, and the prompts the steer will paraphrase. It does not run your loop, and it does not see the steer, which is composed at runtime and never written down anywhere reporails could read. What it can do is get the authored half right so the runtime half has less to corrupt. A goal stated crisply, and measured for whether its wording actually couples to behavior, is a goal the steer has a harder time quietly restating into pass the check. The runtime handoff is yours to build well; the authored surface it starts from is the part reporails measures.

The reason the handoff is worth building well is that no one reviews the steer. Every other instruction in the loop you wrote and can read. The steer the loop writes for itself, once per retry, at machine speed, consumed by the next generate before anyone sees it. That is the one spot where a drifted instruction becomes the next target, and it is where reward hacking is authored, one steer at a time. Make it a reduction you can inspect and keep the grader beyond the agent's edit reach, and the loop optimizes the goal instead of the gauge, which is always the cheaper of the two to satisfy.

The loop still has an arm to take apart

Four arms down, and the pattern holds across all of them: the loop only ever acts on what you wrote into it. The check runs the rule you encoded, the gate refuses on the pattern you set, the surface carries the instructions you loaded. The steer is the one you write without noticing, fresh every retry, and it is where a green result quietly stops meaning what you wanted it to.

One arm is left: the stop. Every loop here quits on a green check and a retry budget, and a loop that stops on a green it was gamed into has stopped too early, on a result that means nothing. Telling a real green from a bought one, and knowing when a loop should quit versus when it should refuse to, is the stop arm's problem, and the last piece in this series.

I work on Reporails, deterministic diagnostics for the instruction files, rules, and prompts that steer coding agents. It reads the steering surface and tells you, with measured evidence, which instructions couple to behavior and which are text the model can ignore. It does not run your loop; it checks the steering you wrote down.

sentences.zh: 这是奖励黑客行为，而且这种边缘故障并不罕见。

sentences.en: Cursor's own engineering team published a piece titled reward hacking is swamping model intelligence gains.
sentences.zh: Cursor 自己的工程团队发表了一篇题为“奖励黑客正在淹没模型情报收益”的文章。

sentences.en: There is a benchmark built to measure it in long-horizon coding agents, SpecBench.
sentences.zh: 有一个基准测试是为了在长期编码代理中测量它而构建的，SpecBench。

sentences.en: And every developer who has pointed an agent at a red suite has watched some version of it: the deleted assertion, the @pytest.mark.skip, the hardcoded return, the sibling test quietly weakened.
sentences.zh: 每个将代理指向红色套件的开发人员都看过它的某个版本：删除的断言、@pytest.mark.skip、硬编码的返回、兄弟测试悄悄减弱。

sentences.en: The agent was told to make the check pass.

sentences.en: Nobody told it the check was a stand-in for the code being correct, so it optimized the check it was actually handed.
sentences.zh: 没有人告诉它该支票是代码正确的替代品，因此它优化了实际提交的支票。

blocks.html_en: That gap, between the check and what the check stands for, is what this piece is about. A loop runs five arms: generate, check, steer, retry, stop. The series opener named them; three pieces since took the check that decides good enough, stop, the gate that refuses a bad write, and the surface every rule loads from. This one takes the arm that sets what the agent aims at on the next try: the steer, and the version of reward hacking the steer hands the model.

sentences.en: That gap, between the check and what the check stands for, is what this piece is about.

sentences.en: A loop runs five arms: generate, check, steer, retry, stop.
sentences.zh: 一个循环运行五个分支：生成、检查、引导、重试、停止。

sentences.en: The series opener named them; three pieces since took the check that decides good enough, stop, the gate that refuses a bad write, and the surface every rule loads from.
sentences.zh: 系列赛揭幕战命名了他们；三块既然采取了决定足够好的检查，停止，拒绝坏写的门，以及每条规则加载的表面。

sentences.en: This one takes the arm that sets what the agent aims at on the next try: the steer, and the version of reward hacking the steer hands the model.
sentences.zh: 这个模型采用了设定代理下次尝试目标的手臂：转向，以及奖励黑客转向模型的版本。

blocks.html_en: The model never sees the whole history. Each retry it sees one prompt, and that prompt is whatever the steer decided to carry back. On the first pass the prompt is the goal. On every pass after that the steer overwrites it. So the target the model aims at on retry three is not the goal you wrote, it is the last thing the steer said, and the steer is a line the loop composed on its own while you were not looking.

sentences.en: The model never sees the whole history.
sentences.zh: 该模型永远看不到整个历史。

sentences.en: Each retry it sees one prompt, and that prompt is whatever the steer decided to carry back.
sentences.zh: 每次重试它都会看到一个提示，而该提示就是引导者决定带回的任何内容。

sentences.en: On the first pass the prompt is the goal.
sentences.zh: 在第一遍中，提示就是目标。

sentences.en: On every pass after that the steer overwrites it.

sentences.en: So the target the model aims at on retry three is not the goal you wrote, it is the last thing the steer said, and the steer is a line the loop composed on its own while you were not looking.

blocks.html_en: The steer gets none of the attention

sentences.en: The steer gets none of the attention
sentences.zh: 公牛没有受到任何关注

blocks.html_en: Reward hacking has more than one cause, and most of the attention goes to two of them: a check loose enough to game, and an agent with write-access to the thing that grades it. The third gets almost none, and it is the one this piece is about. It is the objective the loop hands the model on each retry, and that objective is the steer.

sentences.en: Reward hacking has more than one cause, and most of the attention goes to two of them: a check loose enough to game, and an agent with write-access to the thing that grades it.
sentences.zh: 奖励黑客行为的原因不止一个，大部分注意力都集中在其中两个：一张足够宽松的支票，以及一个对评分内容具有写访问权限的代理。

sentences.en: The third gets almost none, and it is the one this piece is about.
sentences.zh: 第三个几乎没有得到，而这正是这篇文章所要讨论的。

sentences.en: It is the objective the loop hands the model on each retry, and that objective is the steer.
sentences.zh: 这是循环在每次重试时将模型交给模型的目标，而该目标就是转向。

blocks.html_en: The model does not optimize the check directly. It optimizes the instruction it was handed, and that instruction is whatever the steer wrote. When the loop feeds back make the test pass, it has named the check as the goal. From there, optimizing the instruction and gaming the test are the same action, because the cheapest state in which the test passes is the one where the test agrees with whatever the code already does. The steer said the target was green. Green is what came back.

sentences.en: The model does not optimize the check directly.

sentences.zh: 它优化了它所收到的指令，而该指令就是引导者编写的任何指令。

sentences.en: When the loop feeds back make the test pass, it has named the check as the goal.
sentences.zh: 当循环反馈使测试通过时，它就将检查命名为目标。

sentences.en: From there, optimizing the instruction and gaming the test are the same action, because the cheapest state in which the test passes is the one where the test agrees with whatever the code already does.

sentences.en: Green is what came back.
sentences.zh: 绿色是回来的。

blocks.html_en: None of this touches the other roads to a gamed result, and it is worth being honest about that, because the Cursor piece above documents one of them. A large share of the reward hacking it found was answer-retrieval: agents pulling a fix straight from a public pull request or the repository's own bundled git history, with 63% of one model's successful resolutions retrieved rather than derived. That happens with the goal fully intact. It is an access problem, not a steer problem, and no wording of the steer prevents it. The steer is the lever this piece takes because it gets none of that attention and is the cheapest to fix. You write it yourself, once per retry, and most loops write it badly.

sentences.en: None of this touches the other roads to a gamed result, and it is worth being honest about that, because the Cursor piece above documents one of them.

sentences.zh: 转向器是这件作品所采用的杠杆，因为它没有受到太多关注，而且修理起来也是最便宜的。

sentences.zh: 您自己编写它，每次重试一次，并且大多数循环都写得很糟糕。

blocks.html_en: A good steer is a reduction of the check's output. It takes the verdict and the minimal evidence that produced it and hands that back unaltered. The moment the steer summarizes the failure into make it pass, it stops being a reduction and becomes a new goal, and the new goal is the one the agent will game.

sentences.en: The moment the steer summarizes the failure into make it pass, it stops being a reduction and becomes a new goal, and the new goal is the one the agent will game.
sentences.zh: 当引导者将失败总结为使其通过时，它就不再是减少，而是成为一个新目标，而新目标就是代理将要执行的目标。

blocks.html_en: The stub is pinned so the loop is reproducible on your machine, but the branch it takes is not the trick, it is the claim: hand a literal optimizer make the test pass and editing the assertion is the cheapest path to green; hand it the goal plus the failing line and changing the code is. A real model reaches for the same shortcuts under the same two steers. Both runs print stop: test passes after 1 retries and come back green, so from outside the loop the two are indistinguishable, same verdict, same retry count, same clean exit. The difference is only in the artifact. The good steer left charge() fixed and the test asserting == 9000; the bad steer left the bug in place and the test rewritten to == 10000, so the bar is green because the test now certifies the bug.

sentences.en: The stub is pinned so the loop is reproducible on your machine, but the branch it takes is not the trick, it is the claim: hand a literal optimizer make the test pass and editing the assertion is the cheapest path to green; hand it the goal plus the failing line and changing the code is.

blocks.html_en: A green check is not lying here. It is doing exactly its job. The governance-selector piece worked the human version: a green test proves the change conforms to its spec and says nothing about whether the change improved anything, and it named the quadrant where a change is correct, shipped, and no better. Reward hacking is that quadrant reached on purpose. The steer that says make the test pass re-points the spec at the test is green, and the check faithfully certifies conformance to the new, degenerate spec.

sentences.en: A green check is not lying here.
sentences.zh: 这里没有一张绿色支票。

sentences.en: It is doing exactly its job.
sentences.zh: 它正在尽其所能。

sentences.en: The governance-selector piece worked the human version: a green test proves the change conforms to its spec and says nothing about whether the change improved anything, and it named the quadrant where a change is correct, shipped, and no better.
sentences.zh: 治理选择器部分适用于人类版本：绿色测试证明更改符合其规范，并且没有说明更改是否改进了任何内容，并且它指定了更改正确、已交付且没有更好的象限。

sentences.en: Reward hacking is that quadrant reached on purpose.
sentences.zh: 奖励黑客行为是有意达到的象限。

sentences.en: The steer that says make the test pass re-points the spec at the test is green, and the check faithfully certifies conformance to the new, degenerate spec.
sentences.zh: 表示测试通过的转向器重新指出测试时的规范是绿色的，并且检查忠实地证明了与新的、退化的规范的一致性。

blocks.html_en: There are two ways the steer's drift reaches the check, and they call for different defenses. One is paraphrase: the steer restates the goal loosely, and a model-graded check, the kind the check piece set beside the deterministic kind, adopts the loose restatement as its working spec, so make it pass becomes what it grades against. A deterministic check resists that, because it runs the assertion against the code no matter what the steer said about it. The other way is editing: the agent changes the check itself, and here the deterministic check is no safer than the model-graded one, because the cold open did exactly that, rewrote == 9000 to == 10000, and the deterministic assertion passed on the altered test. Determinism buys resistance to paraphrase, not to editing. The axis that decides whether a check survives the agent is not deterministic-versus-graded, it is editable-versus-read-only, and the fix below turns on it.

sentences.en: There are two ways the steer's drift reaches the check, and they call for different defenses.
sentences.zh: 公牛的漂移有两种方式到达检查点，并且它们需要不同的防御。

sentences.en: One is paraphrase: the steer restates the goal loosely, and a model-graded check, the kind the check piece set beside the deterministic kind, adopts the loose restatement as its working spec, so make it pass becomes what it grades against.
sentences.zh: 一种是释义：引导松散地重述目标，而模型分级检查，即设置在确定性类型旁边的检查件的类型，采用松散重述作为其工作规范，因此使其通过成为其分级的依据。

sentences.en: A deterministic check resists that, because it runs the assertion against the code no matter what the steer said about it.
sentences.zh: 确定性检查会抵制这种情况，因为无论引导者对此有何评论，它都会针对代码运行断言。

sentences.en: The other way is editing: the agent changes the check itself, and here the deterministic check is no safer than the model-graded one, because the cold open did exactly that, rewrote == 9000 to == 10000, and the deterministic assertion passed on the altered test.
sentences.zh: 另一种方法是编辑：代理更改检查本身，这里确定性检查并不比模型分级检查更安全，因为冷打开正是这样做的，将 == 9000 重写为 == 10000，并且确定性断言通过了更改后的测试。

sentences.en: Determinism buys resistance to paraphrase, not to editing.
sentences.zh: 决定论带来的是对释义的抵制，而不是对编辑的抵制。

sentences.en: The axis that decides whether a check survives the agent is not deterministic-versus-graded, it is editable-versus-read-only, and the fix below turns on it.
sentences.zh: 决定检查是否在代理中生存的轴不是确定性的与分级的，它是可编辑的与只读的，并且下面的修复打开它。

blocks.html_en: The tests are the recognizable case, and the shape is more general. I have watched an agent, up against a hard limit a measurement had to clear, propose to clear it by removing a piece of what the system did, so the measurement would read green. Not by fixing the thing the measurement was watching. By dropping the capability the measurement stood for and reporting the number as met. Cutting scope to hit a budget is sometimes a real engineering call, but this was not that, because no one had decided the capability was worth less than the number; the agent decided it silently, to turn the gauge green. It is the same move as editing the test: satisfy the measurement, abandon the thing measured. The only reason it did not ship was a human reading the diff and asking why the fix worked by removing capability. A loop running unattended does not ask.

sentences.en: The tests are the recognizable case, and the shape is more general.
sentences.zh: 测试的是可识别的情况，形状比较一般。

sentences.en: I have watched an agent, up against a hard limit a measurement had to clear, propose to clear it by removing a piece of what the system did, so the measurement would read green.
sentences.zh: 我见过一个代理，在遇到测量必须清除的硬性限制时，建议通过删除系统所做的一部分来清除它，这样测量就会显示为绿色。

sentences.en: Not by fixing the thing the measurement was watching.
sentences.zh: 不是通过修复测量所观察的东西来实现的。

sentences.en: By dropping the capability the measurement stood for and reporting the number as met.
sentences.zh: 通过放弃测量所代表的能力并报告满足的数量。

sentences.en: Cutting scope to hit a budget is sometimes a real engineering call, but this was not that, because no one had decided the capability was worth less than the number; the agent decided it silently, to turn the gauge green.
sentences.zh: 削减范围以达到预算有时是一个真正的工程调用，但事实并非如此，因为没有人认为能力的价值低于数量；特工默默地决定，将仪表变成绿色。

sentences.en: It is the same move as editing the test: satisfy the measurement, abandon the thing measured.

sentences.en: The only reason it did not ship was a human reading the diff and asking why the fix worked by removing capability.

blocks.html_en: What the two cases share is the steer. In both, the objective the loop was carrying had quietly collapsed from the goal to the measurement of the goal, and everything downstream optimized the measurement. The check worked as written and the number was accurate. The instruction the loop was feeding itself had drifted from make the product correct to make the gauge read green, and the agent did precisely what that instruction asked.

sentences.en: What the two cases share is the steer.
sentences.zh: 这两个案例的共同点是转向。

sentences.en: In both, the objective the loop was carrying had quietly collapsed from the goal to the measurement of the goal, and everything downstream optimized the measurement.
sentences.zh: 在这两种情况下，循环所承载的目标已经从目标悄然崩溃到目标的测量，并且下游的所有内容都优化了测量。

sentences.en: The check worked as written and the number was accurate.

sentences.zh: 循环本身输入的指令已经从使产品正确变为使仪表读数为绿色，并且代理完全按照指令的要求进行操作。

blocks.html_en: Make the steer a reduction, and keep the grader out of reach

sentences.en: Make the steer a reduction, and keep the grader out of reach
sentences.zh: 减少转向，并将平地机放在够不到的地方

blocks.html_en: Three disciplines keep the steer from teaching the agent to cheat. The first two are the ones that do the work, and the ones most loops skip.

sentences.en: Three disciplines keep the steer from teaching the agent to cheat.
sentences.zh: 三个纪律可以防止教导代理人作弊。

sentences.en: The first two are the ones that do the work, and the ones most loops skip.
sentences.zh: 前两个是完成工作的，也是大多数循环跳过的。

blocks.html_en: Hold the goal constant across retries. State it once, outside the retry arm, and never let the steer restate it. The steer carries the delta, what the last attempt got wrong, and leaves the goal where it was written. A steer that re-authors the goal each iteration is a steer that can drift from it, and the drift compounds, because each retry's paraphrase is a paraphrase of the last.

sentences.en: Hold the goal constant across retries.
sentences.zh: 在重试期间保持目标不变。

sentences.en: State it once, outside the retry arm, and never let the steer restate it.
sentences.zh: 在重试臂之外声明一次，并且永远不要让引导者重新声明它。

sentences.en: The steer carries the delta, what the last attempt got wrong, and leaves the goal where it was written.
sentences.zh: 公牛带着三角洲，这是上次尝试出错的地方，并将目标留在了它所写的地方。

sentences.en: A steer that re-authors the goal each iteration is a steer that can drift from it, and the drift compounds, because each retry's paraphrase is a paraphrase of the last.
sentences.zh: 每次迭代重新制定目标的引导都是可能偏离目标的引导，并且漂移会复合，因为每次重试的释义都是上一次重试的释义。

blocks.html_en: Carry the check's output as a reduction, not a summary. Reduce it to the verdict and the minimal evidence that produced it, and hand that back verbatim. The next attempt should read what actually failed, in the check's own words, not a description of the failure written by the arm in the middle. Written that way the steer is an instruction you could have authored yourself, the goal you fixed plus the check's output reduced to the failing line:

sentences.en: Carry the check's output as a reduction, not a summary.
sentences.zh: 将检查的输出作为减少，而不是摘要。

sentences.en: Reduce it to the verdict and the minimal evidence that produced it, and hand that back verbatim.
sentences.zh: 将其简化为判决和产生该判决的最少证据，然后逐字返还。

sentences.en: The next attempt should read what actually failed, in the check's own words, not a description of the failure written by the arm in the middle.
sentences.zh: 下一次尝试应该读取实际失败的内容（用检查自己的话来说），而不是中间的手臂写下的失败描述。

sentences.en: Written that way the steer is an instruction you could have authored yourself, the goal you fixed plus the check's output reduced to the failing line:
sentences.zh: 以这种方式编写的转向是您可以自己编写的指令，您确定的目标加上检查的输出减少到失败的行：

sentences.en: Enter fullscreen mode Exit fullscreen mode
sentences.zh: 进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

blocks.html_en: Do those two and the steer stops handing the model a reason to game, because the objective it optimizes is the goal, not the green light. The third discipline handles the gaming that remains: keep the grader out of the agent's reach. If the artifact the agent can edit is the artifact that grades it, a steer pointed anywhere near the check eventually gets the check edited to pass, and the editable-versus-read-only axis from the last section is exactly this. Make the grader read-only, or grade the final result on a held-out check the agent never saw while generating, the guard the governance-selector piece borrowed from SkillOpt: accept a self-authored change only when it improves a held-out split, not the data the change was tuned against. Be honest about what that buys. It does not make gaming impossible; SpecBench exists because agents still fail held-out tests, and the gap grows by 28 points for every tenfold increase in the size of the task. What a read-only or held-out grader buys is that the gaming becomes visible and expensive: the model that games the split it could not see gets caught by it, instead of walking away green.

sentences.en: Do those two and the steer stops handing the model a reason to game, because the objective it optimizes is the goal, not the green light.
sentences.zh: 完成这两项操作后，转向器就不再给模型提供玩游戏的理由，因为它优化的目标就是目标，而不是绿灯。

sentences.en: The third discipline handles the gaming that remains: keep the grader out of the agent's reach.
sentences.zh: 第三个原则处理剩下的游戏：让分级机远离代理的范围。

sentences.en: If the artifact the agent can edit is the artifact that grades it, a steer pointed anywhere near the check eventually gets the check edited to pass, and the editable-versus-read-only axis from the last section is exactly this.
sentences.zh: 如果代理可以编辑的工件是对其进行评分的工件，则指向检查附近任何位置的转向最终会使检查编辑通过，并且最后一部分中的可编辑与只读轴正是如此。

sentences.en: Make the grader read-only, or grade the final result on a held-out check the agent never saw while generating, the guard the governance-selector piece borrowed from SkillOpt: accept a self-authored change only when it improves a held-out split, not the data the change was tuned against.
sentences.zh: 将评分器设置为只读，或者对代理在生成时从未见过的保留检查进行评分，守卫从 SkillOpt 借用的治理选择器部分：仅当改进保留分割时才接受自行创作的更改，而不是更改所针对的数据。

sentences.en: Be honest about what that buys.
sentences.zh: 诚实地对待所购买的东西。

sentences.en: It does not make gaming impossible; SpecBench exists because agents still fail held-out tests, and the gap grows by 28 points for every tenfold increase in the size of the task.
sentences.zh: 它并不会让游戏变得不可能；而是让游戏变得不可能。 SpecBench 的存在是因为代理仍然无法通过保留的测试，并且任务规模每增加十倍，差距就会扩大 28 个百分点。

sentences.en: What a read-only or held-out grader buys is that the gaming becomes visible and expensive: the model that games the split it could not see gets caught by it, instead of walking away green.
sentences.zh: 只读或保留的评分者所购买的是游戏变得可见且昂贵：游戏其看不到的分割的模型会被它抓住，而不是走开绿色。

blocks.html_en: What reporails can and cannot see here

sentences.en: What reporails can and cannot see here
sentences.zh: 此处可以看到什么和不能看到什么

blocks.html_en: Reporails reads the steering surface you authored: the instruction files, the rules, and the prompts the steer will paraphrase. It does not run your loop, and it does not see the steer, which is composed at runtime and never written down anywhere reporails could read. What it can do is get the authored half right so the runtime half has less to corrupt. A goal stated crisply, and measured for whether its wording actually couples to behavior, is a goal the steer has a harder time quietly restating into pass the check. The runtime handoff is yours to build well; the authored surface it starts from is the part reporails measures.

sentences.en: Reporails reads the steering surface you authored: the instruction files, the rules, and the prompts the steer will paraphrase.
sentences.zh: Reporails 会读取您编写的转向界面：说明文件、规则以及转向将解释的提示。

sentences.en: It does not run your loop, and it does not see the steer, which is composed at runtime and never written down anywhere reporails could read.
sentences.zh: 它不会运行您的循环，也看不到转向，转向是在运行时组成的，并且从未写在 reporails 可以读取的任何地方。

sentences.en: What it can do is get the authored half right so the runtime half has less to corrupt.
sentences.zh: 它能做的就是让编写的一半正确，这样运行时的一半就不会被破坏。

sentences.en: A goal stated crisply, and measured for whether its wording actually couples to behavior, is a goal the steer has a harder time quietly restating into pass the check.
sentences.zh: 明确表述的目标，并衡量其措辞是否真正与行为相结合，是一个很难安静地重申并通过检查的目标。

sentences.en: The runtime handoff is yours to build well; the authored surface it starts from is the part reporails measures.
sentences.zh: 运行时交接由您负责构建；它所起始的创作表面是部分重新调整措施。

blocks.html_en: The reason the handoff is worth building well is that no one reviews the steer. Every other instruction in the loop you wrote and can read. The steer the loop writes for itself, once per retry, at machine speed, consumed by the next generate before anyone sees it. That is the one spot where a drifted instruction becomes the next target, and it is where reward hacking is authored, one steer at a time. Make it a reduction you can inspect and keep the grader beyond the agent's edit reach, and the loop optimizes the goal instead of the gauge, which is always the cheaper of the two to satisfy.

sentences.en: The reason the handoff is worth building well is that no one reviews the steer.
sentences.zh: 交接值得好好建设的原因是没有人审查转向。

sentences.en: Every other instruction in the loop you wrote and can read.
sentences.zh: 您编写并可以读取的循环中的所有其他指令。

sentences.en: The steer the loop writes for itself, once per retry, at machine speed, consumed by the next generate before anyone sees it.
sentences.zh: 循环为自己写入的转向，每次重试一次，以机器速度，在任何人看到它之前被下一个生成消耗。

sentences.en: That is the one spot where a drifted instruction becomes the next target, and it is where reward hacking is authored, one steer at a time.
sentences.zh: 这是偏离指令成为下一个目标的地方，也是奖励黑客创作的地方，一次一个引导。

sentences.en: Make it a reduction you can inspect and keep the grader beyond the agent's edit reach, and the loop optimizes the goal instead of the gauge, which is always the cheaper of the two to satisfy.
sentences.zh: 使其减少，您可以检查并将分级机保持在代理的编辑范围之外，并且循环优化目标而不是仪表，这始终是两者中更便宜的一个。

blocks.html_en: The loop still has an arm to take apart

sentences.en: The loop still has an arm to take apart
sentences.zh: 环仍有一个臂需要拆开

blocks.html_en: Four arms down, and the pattern holds across all of them: the loop only ever acts on what you wrote into it. The check runs the rule you encoded, the gate refuses on the pattern you set, the surface carries the instructions you loaded. The steer is the one you write without noticing, fresh every retry, and it is where a green result quietly stops meaning what you wanted it to.

sentences.en: Four arms down, and the pattern holds across all of them: the loop only ever acts on what you wrote into it.
sentences.zh: 四臂向下，该模式适用于所有臂：循环仅对您写入的内容起作用。

sentences.en: The check runs the rule you encoded, the gate refuses on the pattern you set, the surface carries the instructions you loaded.
sentences.zh: 检查运行您编码的规则，门拒绝您设置的模式，表面承载您加载的指令。

sentences.en: The steer is the one you write without noticing, fresh every retry, and it is where a green result quietly stops meaning what you wanted it to.
sentences.zh: 引导是您在没有注意到的情况下编写的，每次重试都会刷新，并且绿色结果会在此处安静地停止，意味着您想要的结果。

blocks.html_en: One arm is left: the stop. Every loop here quits on a green check and a retry budget, and a loop that stops on a green it was gamed into has stopped too early, on a result that means nothing. Telling a real green from a bought one, and knowing when a loop should quit versus when it should refuse to, is the stop arm's problem, and the last piece in this series.

sentences.en: One arm is left: the stop.
sentences.zh: 剩下一只手臂：停止。

sentences.en: Every loop here quits on a green check and a retry budget, and a loop that stops on a green it was gamed into has stopped too early, on a result that means nothing.
sentences.zh: 这里的每个循环都会在绿色支票和重试预算上退出，而在游戏进入的绿色上停止的循环则停止得太早，其结果毫无意义。

sentences.en: Telling a real green from a bought one, and knowing when a loop should quit versus when it should refuse to, is the stop arm's problem, and the last piece in this series.
sentences.zh: 区分真正的果岭和购买的果岭，并知道循环何时应该退出以及何时应该拒绝，是止动臂的问题，也是本系列的最后一部分。

blocks.html_en: I work on Reporails, deterministic diagnostics for the instruction files, rules, and prompts that steer coding agents. It reads the steering surface and tells you, with measured evidence, which instructions couple to behavior and which are text the model can ignore. It does not run your loop; it checks the steering you wrote down.

sentences.en: I work on Reporails, deterministic diagnostics for the instruction files, rules, and prompts that steer coding agents.
sentences.zh: 我从事 Reporails 工作，它是指导编码代理的指令文件、规则和提示的确定性诊断。

sentences.en: It reads the steering surface and tells you, with measured evidence, which instructions couple to behavior and which are text the model can ignore.
sentences.zh: 它读取转向表面，并通过测量的证据告诉您哪些指令与行为耦合以及哪些是模型可以忽略的文本。

sentences.en: It does not run your loop; it checks the steering you wrote down.
sentences.zh: 它不会运行你的循环；它会检查您写下的转向。

content_html_zh:
您给了代理一个失败的测试，并告诉它让套件变得绿色。 它又变绿了。 然后你阅读差异：它没有触及被测试的代码。 它编辑了测试。 read == 9000 的断言现在读取 == 10000，这正是 buggy 函数返回的内容，因此条形图是绿色的，因为测试已更改为与 bug 一致。

这有一个名字。 这是奖励黑客行为，而且这种边缘故障并不罕见。 Cursor 自己的工程团队发表了一篇题为“奖励黑客正在淹没模型情报收益”的文章。 有一个基准测试是为了在长期编码代理中测量它而构建的，SpecBench。 每个将代理指向红色套件的开发人员都看过它的某个版本：删除的断言、@pytest.mark.skip、硬编码的返回、兄弟测试悄悄减弱。 代理人被告知让支票通过。 它使检查通过了。 没有人告诉它该支票是代码正确的替代品，因此它优化了实际提交的支票。

支票和支票所代表的含义之间的差距就是这篇文章的主题。 一个循环运行五个分支：生成、检查、引导、重试、停止。 系列赛揭幕战命名了他们；三块既然采取了决定足够好的检查，停止，拒绝坏写的门，以及每条规则加载的表面。 这个模型采用了设定代理下次尝试目标的手臂：转向，以及奖励黑客转向模型的版本。

舵是什么

舵机是将判决转化为下一条指令的手臂。 当支票返回红色时，一行文本将从支票的输出中组装起来并输入到下一个生成中。 这是门块构建的循环，重构 src/ 直到守卫保持。 舵是其中的一只手臂：

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# work-until-checked: refactor src/ until the guard holds.
MAX=5; i=0
prompt="Remove every mock-library import from production code under src/."
while [ "$i" -lt "$MAX" ]; do
    run_agent --task "$prompt"                      # GENERATE
    if bash no-mocks.sh; then                       # CHECK
        echo "stop: guard holds after $i retries"; exit 0
    fi
    prompt="The last attempt still tripped the guard; fix it:
$(bash no-mocks.sh 2>&1)"                            # STEER: only the new signal
    i=$((i + 1))
done
echo "stop: budget exhausted, guard still red"; exit 1

进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

该模型永远看不到整个历史。 每次重试它都会看到一个提示，而该提示就是引导者决定带回的任何内容。 在第一遍中，提示就是目标。 此后每次通过时，转向器都会覆盖它。 因此，模型在重试第三次时瞄准的目标不是您编写的目标，而是转向器所说的最后一件事，而转向器是循环在您不注意时自行组成的一条线。

公牛没有受到任何关注

奖励黑客行为的原因不止一个，大部分注意力都集中在其中两个：一张足够宽松的支票，以及一个对评分内容具有写访问权限的代理。 第三个几乎没有得到，而这正是这篇文章所要讨论的。 这是循环在每次重试时将模型交给模型的目标，而该目标就是转向。

该模型不直接优化检查。 它优化了它所收到的指令，而该指令就是引导者编写的任何指令。 当循环反馈使测试通过时，它就将检查命名为目标。 从那里开始，优化指令和测试测试是相同的操作，因为测试通过的最便宜的状态是测试与代码已经执行的任何操作一致的状态。 舵手说目标是绿色的。 绿色是回来的。

这些都没有涉及到游戏结果的其他途径，并且值得诚实地对待这一点，因为上面的光标片段记录了其中之一。 它发现的奖励黑客行为很大一部分是答案检索：代理直接从公共拉取请求或存储库自己的捆绑 git 历史记录中提取修复程序，其中 63％ 的模型成功解决方案是检索而不是派生的。 当目标完好无损时就会发生这种情况。 这是一个访问问题，而不是转向问题，而且转向的措辞也无法阻止它。 转向器是这件作品所采用的杠杆，因为它没有受到太多关注，而且修理起来也是最便宜的。 您自己编写它，每次重试一次，并且大多数循环都写得很糟糕。

好舵手掌握目标

看看上面的循环返回了什么。 目标在循环之前声明一次，并且 run_agent 调用永远不会重新发送它。 steer 重写了提示以携带守卫自己的输出，仅此而已：

prompt="The last attempt still tripped the guard; fix it:
$(bash no-mocks.sh 2>&1)"                            # STEER: only the new signal

进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

这就是你想要的形状：先是指导，然后是证据。 修复警卫标记的行，这是检查中逐字记录的行。 目标没有移动，因为引导者从未重申目标，而是将增量附加到目标上。 该模型获得原始目标以及对上次尝试出错的精确说明（用检查自己的话说）。 通过测试永远不是它优化的全部，因为它所服务的目标仍然在失败行旁边的页面上。

良好的转向是减少检查的输出。 它接受判决和产生判决的最低限度的证据，并将其原封不动地返还。 当引导者将失败总结为使其通过时，它就不再是减少，而是成为一个新目标，而新目标就是代理将要执行的目标。

观看循环游戏自己的检查

这是相同的循环，一次检查，两次转向。 该检查是一个单元测试：100 美元的费用在 10% 的折扣后应为 90 美元。 该代码缺少折扣。 生成器是模型的替代品；它的两个分支执行每个指令名称中最便宜的事情，这就是重点，因此两者都在页面上而不是隐藏：

GOAL="charge(cents) must apply the 10% discount so charge(10000) == 9000."

# THE CHECK: run the test. pass = exit 0.
check() { python3 test_charge.py >/dev/null 2>&1; }

# THE STEER: turn the check's output into the next instruction.
steer_good() { printf '%s\nThe test still fails; fix the failing assertion: %s\n' "$GOAL" "$1"; }
steer_bad()  { printf 'The test is still failing. Make the test pass.\n'; }

# THE GENERATOR: a literal optimizer standing in for the model. It takes the
# cheapest route the instruction names, the same shortcut a real model reaches for.
run_agent() {
    case "$1" in
      *"Make the test pass"*)         sed -i 's/== 9000/== 10000/' test_charge.py ;;  # game: edit the test
      *"fix the failing assertion"*)  sed -i 's/return cents/return int(cents*0.9)/' charge.py ;;  # fix: change the code
    esac
}

进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

好的引导者保持目标并附加失败的断言（预期 9000，得到 10000），因此 run_agent 采用修复分支。 坏转向丢掉了目标并交还了症状，因此 run_agent 占据了游戏分支。 运行每个循环并且两者都以相同的方式终止：

$ bash game-demo.sh good
stop: test passes after 1 retries
charge(10000) returns: 9000
test asserts:          == 9000
check verdict:         GREEN
goal met ($100 charges at $90): YES

$ bash game-demo.sh bad
stop: test passes after 1 retries
charge(10000) returns: 10000
test asserts:          == 10000
check verdict:         GREEN
goal met ($100 charges at $90): NO

进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

存根被固定，因此循环可以在您的计算机上重现，但它所采用的分支不是技巧，而是声明：手动优化器使测试通过并编辑断言是实现绿色的最便宜的路径；将目标加上失败的行交给它并更改代码。 真实的模型在相同的两个转向下达到相同的捷径。 两者都运行 print stop: 1 次重试后测试通过并返回绿色，因此从循环外部看，两者是无法区分的，相同的判决，相同的重试计数，相同的干净退出。 区别仅在于工件。 良好的转向左 charge() 已修复，测试断言 == 9000；错误的转向将错误留在原地，并且测试重写为 == 10000，因此条形图是绿色的，因为测试现在证明了该错误。

支票证明了驾驶员所指的一切

这里没有一张绿色支票。 它正在尽其所能。 治理选择器部分适用于人类版本：绿色测试证明更改符合其规范，并且没有说明更改是否改进了任何内容，并且它指定了更改正确、已交付且没有更好的象限。 奖励黑客行为是有意达到的象限。 表示测试通过的转向器重新指出测试时的规范是绿色的，并且检查忠实地证明了与新的、退化的规范的一致性。

公牛的漂移有两种方式到达检查点，并且它们需要不同的防御。 一种是释义：引导松散地重述目标，而模型分级检查，即设置在确定性类型旁边的检查件的类型，采用松散重述作为其工作规范，因此使其通过成为其分级的依据。 确定性检查会抵制这种情况，因为无论引导者对此有何评论，它都会针对代码运行断言。 另一种方法是编辑：代理更改检查本身，这里确定性检查并不比模型分级检查更安全，因为冷打开正是这样做的，将 == 9000 重写为 == 10000，并且确定性断言通过了更改后的测试。 决定论带来的是对释义的抵制，而不是对编辑的抵制。 决定检查是否在代理中生存的轴不是确定性的与分级的，它是可编辑的与只读的，并且下面的修复打开它。

同样的举动，远离测试

测试的是可识别的情况，形状比较一般。 我见过一个代理，在遇到测量必须清除的硬性限制时，建议通过删除系统所做的一部分来清除它，这样测量就会显示为绿色。 不是通过修复测量所观察的东西来实现的。 通过放弃测量所代表的能力并报告满足的数量。 削减范围以达到预算有时是一个真正的工程调用，但事实并非如此，因为没有人认为能力的价值低于数量；特工默默地决定，将仪表变成绿色。 这与编辑测试是同样的举动：满足测量，放弃测量的东西。 它没有发布的唯一原因是有人阅读差异并询问为什么修复通过删除功能起作用。 无人值守运行的循环不会询问。

这两个案例的共同点是转向。 在这两种情况下，循环所承载的目标已经从目标悄然崩溃到目标的测量，并且下游的所有内容都优化了测量。 支票如所写的那样有效，并且号码准确。 循环本身输入的指令已经从使产品正确变为使仪表读数为绿色，并且代理完全按照指令的要求进行操作。

减少转向，并将平地机放在够不到的地方

三个纪律可以防止教导代理人作弊。 前两个是完成工作的，也是大多数循环跳过的。

在重试期间保持目标不变。 在重试臂之外声明一次，并且永远不要让引导者重新声明它。 公牛带着三角洲，这是上次尝试出错的地方，并将目标留在了它所写的地方。 每次迭代重新制定目标的引导都是可能偏离目标的引导，并且漂移会复合，因为每次重试的释义都是上一次重试的释义。

将检查的输出作为减少，而不是摘要。 将其简化为判决和产生该判决的最少证据，然后逐字返还。 下一次尝试应该读取实际失败的内容（用检查自己的话来说），而不是中间的手臂写下的失败描述。 以这种方式编写的转向是您可以自己编写的指令，您确定的目标加上检查的输出减少到失败的行：

charge(cents) must apply the 10% discount so charge(10000) == 9000.
The test still fails; fix the failing assertion: expected 9000, got 10000.

进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

完成这两项操作后，转向器就不再给模型提供玩游戏的理由，因为它优化的目标就是目标，而不是绿灯。 第三个原则处理剩下的游戏：让分级机远离代理的范围。 如果代理可以编辑的工件是对其进行评分的工件，则指向检查附近任何位置的转向最终会使检查编辑通过，并且最后一部分中的可编辑与只读轴正是如此。 将评分器设置为只读，或者对代理在生成时从未见过的保留检查进行评分，守卫从 SkillOpt 借用的治理选择器部分：仅当改进保留分割时才接受自行创作的更改，而不是更改所针对的数据。 诚实地对待所购买的东西。 它并不会让游戏变得不可能；而是让游戏变得不可能。 SpecBench 的存在是因为代理仍然无法通过保留的测试，并且任务规模每增加十倍，差距就会扩大 28 个百分点。 只读或保留的评分者所购买的是游戏变得可见且昂贵：游戏其看不到的分割的模型会被它抓住，而不是走开绿色。

此处可以看到什么和不能看到什么

Reporails 会读取您编写的转向界面：说明文件、规则以及转向将解释的提示。 它不会运行您的循环，也看不到转向，转向是在运行时组成的，并且从未写在 reporails 可以读取的任何地方。 它能做的就是让编写的一半正确，这样运行时的一半就不会被破坏。 明确表述的目标，并衡量其措辞是否真正与行为相结合，是一个很难安静地重申并通过检查的目标。 运行时交接由您负责构建；它所起始的创作表面是部分重新调整措施。

交接值得好好建设的原因是没有人审查转向。 您编写并可以读取的循环中的所有其他指令。 循环为自己写入的转向，每次重试一次，以机器速度，在任何人看到它之前被下一个生成消耗。 这是偏离指令成为下一个目标的地方，也是奖励黑客创作的地方，一次一个引导。 使其减少，您可以检查并将分级机保持在代理的编辑范围之外，并且循环优化目标而不是仪表，这始终是两者中更便宜的一个。

环仍有一个臂需要拆开

四臂向下，该模式适用于所有臂：循环仅对您写入的内容起作用。 检查运行您编码的规则，门拒绝您设置的模式，表面承载您加载的指令。 引导是您在没有注意到的情况下编写的，每次重试都会刷新，并且绿色结果会在此处安静地停止，意味着您想要的结果。

剩下一只手臂：停止。 这里的每个循环都会在绿色支票和重试预算上退出，而在游戏进入的绿色上停止的循环则停止得太早，其结果毫无意义。 区分真正的果岭和购买的果岭，并知道循环何时应该退出以及何时应该拒绝，是止动臂的问题，也是本系列的最后一部分。

我从事 Reporails 工作，它是指导编码代理的指令文件、规则和提示的确定性诊断。 它读取转向表面，并通过测量的证据告诉您哪些指令与行为耦合以及哪些是模型可以忽略的文本。 它不会运行你的循环；它会检查您写下的转向。
